mechanism: Term premium at 50-80bp is in the mid-transition zone — below the ~150bp+ associated with established positive correlation regimes and above the ~0bp associated with negative regimes. The term premium level both reflects and predicts the correlation state.
regime_dependence: Historical threshold levels (~150bp) may not apply directly given different market structures (risk parity, basis trade, leveraged strategies). The threshold may be lower or higher than historical levels.
